response: The function computes a CRC‑32 checksum of the input byte sequence using the reflected polynomial 0xEDB88320 (the standard IEEE 802.3 CRC‑32). It initializes the CRC to 0xFFFFFFFF, XORs each incoming byte into the low‑order bits, then iterates over the 8 bits of that byte, shifting the CRC right and conditionally XOR‑ing the polynomial when the least‑significant bit is 1; after all bytes are processed it returns the bitwise complement of the accumulated CRC.
